summary: PR #2072 matched and improved trophy module work across ty/toy.c, ty/tylist.c, and ty/tyfigupon.c, with supporting header/type updates and a caller update in ifprize.c for the recovered un_803063D4 signature. Review centered on replacing raw pointer math/M2C_FIELD with recovered structs or known types, keeping TyModeState usage, using inline string literals/accesses instead of string-offset forms, and justifying new struct fields and trophy table/count semantics.

key_files.role: Main trophy-module matching work; diff shows new implementations for trophy lookup, unlock-state, fog/light callbacks, animation helpers, and dev text display functions.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: toy.c hunks adding un_803053C4, Trophy_SetUnlockState, un_803060BC, un_803062BC, un_80306930, un_80306A0C, un_80306C5C, un_80307F64, un_803082F8, un_80308328, un_80308354, un_803109A0, un_803114E8
text_corpus: decomp-dev report lists toy new matches and improvements

key_files.role: Trophy list matching work and main focus of review feedback about casts, pointer math, struct extraction, and string accesses.
Recovered or expanded trophy-related structs and Toy fields; review questioned confidence and justification for new structures and fields.
Header updates supporting recovered toy/trophy functions and signatures.
evidence_refs: human_pr_text: updates ifprize.c caller to match new un_803063D4 signature

key_files.role: Header updates for trophy list work.
Smaller trophy figure module matching work included in PR scope.
evidence_refs: human_pr_text: trophy module files include tyfigupon.c
text_corpus: decomp-dev report lists tyfigupon un_80314B54 as a new match

key_files.role: Caller updated for recovered un_803063D4 signature.
evidence_refs: human_pr_text: updates ifprize.c caller to match new un_803063D4 signature

key_files.role: Small cleanup moving an extern declaration out of the C body into the static header and formatting the ChangeMotionState call.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: removed source-local extern f32 ftKb_Init_804D9570

key_files.role: Owns the ftKb_Init_804D9570 extern after cleanup.
Small header adjustment in trophy display area.

what_changed: PR body claims 100% match for 14 functions and improvements on another 15 across toy.c, tylist.c, and tyfigupon.c.

Loaded bot report excerpt shows matched-code progress of +1832 bytes, 10 new matches, and 19 improvements at that recorded point; this partially differs from the PR-body count and may reflect an intermediate report.

toy.c gained implementations for multiple trophy lookup, unlock, display, fog/light, and animation-related functions, including un_803060BC, un_803062BC, un_80306930, un_80306A0C, un_803082F8, un_80308328, and large partial matches such as Trophy_SetUnlockState.
tylist.c gained implementations and dependencies for trophy list behavior, archive loading, language checks, text/SIS library use, and table traversal.

types.h added or expanded trophy-related type information such as ToyAnimState, ToyEntry, TrophyData, and Toy fields including x19C and trophyTable; reviewers questioned justification for some of these.
ifprize.c changed un_803063D4 call sites from no-argument to three-argument form.
ftKb_Init.c moved ftKb_Init_804D9570 from a source-local extern declaration into ftKb_Init.static.h.

smart_moves.text: Signature recovery was propagated to a caller instead of leaving a mismatched call surface: ifprize.c now calls un_803063D4(0, 0, 0).
A source-local extern in ftKb_Init.c was moved into the static header, aligning declaration ownership with header-based prototypes.
Review identified that an existing TyModeState type should not be regressed back to M2C_FIELD access.
Review pushed tylist.c away from raw pointer math and toward extracting/using structs where available.

decomp_lessons.lesson: When a known local state type already exists, do not revert its field access to M2C_FIELD just because the generated form matches; keep the typed state representation.
Pointer math in reviewable decomp source should be aggressively revisited: reviewers asked to fix all pointer math in tylist.c and to extract a struct for an HSD_SisLib offset access if possible.
New recovered structs and fields need explicit justification when their meaning or layout confidence is not obvious from the surrounding code.
String accesses that appear as offsets into a string blob may be review targets; in this PR reviewers asked for them to be fixed up to use the inlined string form.

naming_conventions.name: TyModeState
naming_conventions.lesson: Preserve the existing semantic type name when accessing un_804A284C mode state instead of reverting to M2C_FIELD.

naming_conventions.name: ToyAnimState
naming_conventions.lesson: Proposed type name for animation state located at un_804A26B8 + 0x3F0; review evidence supports that this was proposed, but also that confidence/justification was challenged.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: toy.c un_80307F64 casts un_804A26B8 + 0x3F0 to ToyAnimState

naming_conventions.name: ToyEntry
naming_conventions.lesson: Proposed table-entry type for un_803109A0 stack table lookup; review evidence supports existence of the proposed type but not independent validation of the semantic name.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: toy.c un_803109A0 uses ToyEntry table[9]

naming_conventions.name: TrophyData
naming_conventions.lesson: Proposed trophy data lookup entry type with id sentinel and fields used by un_803060BC; reviewers asked for justification of these recovered fields.

naming_conventions.name: trophyTable / trophyCount
naming_conventions.lesson: Semantic field names were proposed for Toy trophy unlock storage, but review specifically requested justification for these names/fields.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: Trophy_SetUnlockState uses toy->trophyTable and toy->trophyCount

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Used pointer-walk and goto-heavy source shapes in several recovered functions, including trophy table scans and language-dependent paths.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: un_803109A0 uses pointer walk and found label
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caveat: The loaded evidence shows the tactic in the diff but does not include final objdiff rationale for each shape.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Used a forced larger stack frame local array in un_803114E8: s32 pad[0x20] with comment 'Force larger stack frame'.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caveat: This is a matching tactic that would normally need verifier evidence; the loaded slice does not show a reviewer accepting the pad as permanent style.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Replaced at least one M2C_FIELD access with a temporary typed local struct in toy.c: ((TyViewData*) un_804D6E6C)->x4.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caveat: This supports the typed-fields direction, but the slice does not prove whether TyViewData was final or later moved to a shared header.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Some generated-looking raw casts and pointer arithmetic remained in excerpts and were explicitly called out in review.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: Trophy_SetUnlockState uses byteOffset and u8* casts
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caveat: Treat as review feedback, not as an endorsed tactic.

notes: Changed-file metadata and review comments are strong and directly loaded.
Raw diff is truncated, so not every final change or final resolution can be verified from the loaded slice.

PR body claims 14 fully matched functions and 15 improvements; the loaded bot report excerpt shows 10 new matches and 19 improvements at one point, so match counts should be treated as PR/bot-reported progress rather than independently verified final objdiff results.
Review comments show concerns and requested changes but the loaded slice does not prove exactly which feedback items were fully resolved in the final merged diff.

Some type and field names are visible in diff excerpts but reviewer comments explicitly questioned their justification, so they should not be promoted as universally validated semantics without further curation.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Do not regress known state structs to M2C_FIELD
accepted_candidate_records.text: In trophy display code, review called out reverting TyModeState access to M2C_FIELD as undesirable. Prefer the existing typed state field access when the type is already known.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Pointer math and raw casts should trigger struct/type recovery review
accepted_candidate_records.text: tylist.c review asked to fix all pointer math, questioned unnecessary casts, and asked whether an HSD_SisLib offset access could be represented by an extracted struct.

accepted_candidate_records.title: String offset accesses may need inlined string cleanup
accepted_candidate_records.text: Review requested tylist string accesses be fixed to use the inlined string form rather than offset-style access through a string blob.

source_update_candidates.title: Require justification notes for newly recovered structs or semantic fields when evidence is non-obvious
source_update_candidates.text: When adding recovered structs or semantic fields to shared headers, include the local justification when the evidence is not self-evident: access offsets, table stride/sentinel evidence, callsite behavior, or matching constraints. PR #2072 reviewers explicitly asked for confidence/justification for ToyAnimState, ToyEntry, TrophyData, trophyTable, and trophyCount.
source_update_candidates.reason: Current standards cover typed fields and conservative naming, but this PR provides concrete review evidence that shared type/field additions need documented justification when semantics are uncertain.

source_update_candidates.title: ty module trophy matching touched toy, tylist, and tyfigupon
source_update_candidates.text: PR #2072 focused on trophy-module matching in src/melee/ty/toy.c, src/melee/ty/tylist.c, and src/melee/ty/tyfigupon.c, with supporting header/type changes.
source_update_candidates.reason: Useful path-scope candidate for future trophy-module searches; curator should verify against current source before adding as a path fact.

rejection_notes: Do not promote the exact final match count as independently verified from this slice because PR body and loaded bot report excerpt differ.
Do not promote ToyAnimState, ToyEntry, TrophyData, trophyTable, or trophyCount semantics as fully accepted global knowledge solely from this slice; review comments explicitly asked for justification.
Do not treat the forced stack pad in un_803114E8 as accepted style; the slice shows the tactic but not the verifier evidence required by standards.
Do not infer reviewer intent beyond the quoted comments; the slice does not show final review resolution for every requested cleanup.
